name: WLF_GRW_PROCESSING_DETAILS
description: Table to store status and errors of reconcile role guides processing information.

columns.Name: GROW_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to the grow object id. Example Role Guide Id

columns.Name: GROW_OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Reference to grow object type. Example Role Guide

columns.Name: IS_RECONCILE_READY
columns.Comments: Indicator to provide hint whether learn object is grow to  be reconciled.

columns.Name: LATEST_PROCESSED_DATE
columns.Comments: The date when grow object is last reconciled.

columns.Name: LATEST_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: The latest job id that processed the grow object

columns.Name: LAST_SUCC_PROCESSED_DATE
columns.Comments: The date when grow object is last reconciled successfully.

columns.Name: LAST_SUCC_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: The job id of last successful reconcile of grow object

columns.Name: JOB_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the process or Job

columns.Name: LOG
columns.Comments: Log for the grow assignments reconcile action

columns.Name: ERROR_LOG
columns.Comments: Contains error information about the failed call when grow object is reconciled.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
